input.subject: Production is down - 500 errors on every API call
input.body: All our team's API calls have been returning 500 for the last 10 minutes. We have a customer demo in 30 min. Help.

expected.draft_reply: We see the outage and engineering is investigating now. We'll update you within 15 minutes with status. Sorry for the disruption.

input.subject: Can I get an invoice for last month?
input.body: I need a copy of December's invoice for our accounting team.

expected.draft_reply: Happy to help — I'll have billing send December's invoice to the email on your account today. Anything else you need?

input.subject: Feature: dark mode please?
input.body: Would love a dark mode for the dashboard, the white background hurts my eyes at night.

expected.draft_reply: Thanks for the suggestion — I've logged this for our product team to consider. Anything else we can help with in the meantime?
